_comment: Folio legal docs manifest. Source of truth for the latest ToS / Privacy version: a GitHub Action syncs this into Supabase tos_versions (which the app reads), and it is also bundled into the app as an offline fallback. Bump version + summary when ToS / Privacy changes.

terms.summary_zh: v1.5：新增澳洲（《澳洲消費者法》不可排除之消費者保證 carve-out、澳洲消費者管轄）與美國上架合規（DMCA 通知 / 取下程序、禁性交易 / 販運、責任 carve-out、安全資源）相關條款。
terms.summary_en: v1.5: Adds Australia provisions (non-excludable Australian Consumer Law guarantee carve-out; Australian-consumer jurisdiction) and US launch-compliance provisions (DMCA notice-and-takedown, prohibition of commercial sex / trafficking, liability carve-outs, safety resources).

privacy.summary_zh: v1.5：新增澳洲（隱私法 / APPs、線上安全法、敏感資料同意、跨境 APP 8、資料外洩 NDB 通知）與澳門（第 8/2005 號法律、主管機關 DSPDP）章節；補齊美國各州隱私權、敏感資料說明、CalOPPA Do-Not-Track 揭露、不販售 / 不分享聲明；釐清「想找的性別」僅顯示、不參與配對過濾，且不傳送至 Firebase 分析。
privacy.summary_en: v1.5: Adds Australia (Privacy Act/APPs, Online Safety Act, sensitive-data consent, APP 8 cross-border, NDB breach notice) and Macau (Law 8/2005, regulator DSPDP) sections; adds US state privacy rights, sensitive-data note, CalOPPA Do-Not-Track disclosure, no-sale/no-share statement; clarifies that desired gender is display-only (not used for match filtering) and is not sent to Firebase Analytics.
